expectations.text: Output contains an explicit rating on a defined scale
expectations.evidence: Has a criteria evaluation table and 'Verdict preliminaire' but no single numeric rating on a defined scale

expectations.text: Strengths section with specific evidence from profile
expectations.evidence: 4 strengths with evidence (Criteo/Datadog environments, promotion, exposure to management, team size)

expectations.text: Gaps section distinguishing unknowns from concerns
expectations.evidence: Gaps are embedded in 'Zones de risque' — no separate gaps section with unknown/concerning distinction
4 risks: tech lead->manager transition (CRITIQUE), perf management (CRITIQUE), scope jump, visibility
GO/NO GO/MAYBE framework with clear criteria for each

expectations.text: Interview questions use behavioral format targeting perf management and conflict
expectations.evidence: 7 questions in structured phases with 'Bons signaux' and 'Mauvais signaux' for each

expectations.text: Includes a scoring rubric for the call
expectations.evidence: 6-dimension weighted scoring grid with 3.5/5 threshold and critical dimension floor
Q1: feedback, Q2: perf management, Q3: talent development, Q6: transition, Q7: onboarding scenario

expectations.text: The entire output is in French
